allWorkspaces.description: Header title for all workspaces section

backToFileDrop.description: Button to go back to file drop zone

clearAllData.description: Button to clear all extension data

clearAllDataComplete.description: Success message after clearing all data
clearAllDataComplete.message: All extension data has been cleared. The page will reload.

clearAllDataError.description: Error message when clearing data fails

clearAllDataTitle.description: Tooltip for clear all data button
clearAllDataTitle.message: Clear all extension data and reset to fresh install

confirmClearAllData.description: Confirmation message for clearing all data
confirmClearAllData.message:
This will clear ALL extension data including:
- All cached tracks and workspaces
- All metadata
- Download history
- Authentication token

You will need to visit suno.com again to re-authenticate.

This action cannot be undone. Continue?

confirmReset.message: Are you sure you want to reset all download status? This will allow you to download tracks again.

customDownloadDescription.description: Description text for custom download tab
customDownloadDescription.message: Drop your missing-tracks.txt file here to download only the missing tracks.

downloadAllMetadata.description: Button to download CSV with full metadata

downloadCsvPrompt.description: Prompt to download CSV after fetching tracks
downloadCsvPrompt.message:
Found {count} tracks from {workspaces} workspace(s).

Would you like to download this list as a CSV file (packaged in a ZIP with library syncing scripts)?

downloadSelectedMP3Custom.description: Button to download selected MP3 in custom download tab

downloadSelectedWAVCustom.description: Button to download selected WAV in custom download tab

downloadTrackList.description: Button label for downloading simple track list (CSV + scripts, no metadata)

dropFileHere.message: Drop file here or click to browse

errorsResetHere.description: Reset button text in top right corner

exportLibraryAlertMessage.description: Message for the export library alert
exportLibraryAlertMessage.message:
This will create a ZIP file containing:
- suno-tracks-list.csv (list of all tracks)
- check-library.bat (Windows script)
- check-library.sh (Linux/macOS script)
- README.txt (instructions)

⚠️ IMPORTANT: After downloading, extract the ZIP file to the folder where you downloaded your tracks (MP3/WAV files).

The scripts need to be in the same folder as your downloaded tracks to work correctly.

Continue?

exportSunoLibrary.description: Button to export library as ZIP

extensionDescription.message: Quickly export your Suno tracks from each workspace as MP3 or WAV files with metadata

rawApiResponse.description: Header for raw API data in sidecar file

readmeBatFile.message: - check-library.bat: Windows script to check for downloaded files

readmeCsvFile.message: - suno-tracks-list.csv: Simplified list of all your tracks (easy to parse, no long text fields)

readmeCustomDownloadStep4.message: 4. The extension will show only tracks that are missing files

readmeCustomDownloadStep5.message: 5. Download MP3 or WAV for tracks that need them

readmeDuplicatesFormat.message: - duplicates.txt: Contains tracks with multiple files of the same type

readmeDuplicatesNote.message: Files are listed with their modification dates to help identify which is older.

readmeJsonFile.message: - suno-tracks-list.json: Full metadata including lyrics and prompts (for detailed information)

readmeJsonScripts.description: List item for JSON scripts in README

readmeLinuxStep1.message: 1. Extract this ZIP file to your downloads folder (where your MP3/WAV files are)

readmeLinuxStep5.message: 5. The script will analyze your folder and create:

readmeLinuxStep5a.message: - missing-tracks.txt: List of tracks with file status (mp3Found, wavFound, txtFound, duplicates)

readmeLinuxStep5b.message: - duplicates.txt: List of tracks with multiple files showing filenames and dates

readmeLinuxStep6.message: 6. Use the Custom Download tab in Suno Tracks Exporter to download missing tracks

readmeMissingTracksFormat.message: - missing-tracks.txt: Contains all tracks with their file status

readmeNote.message: NOTE: The scripts check for files containing the track ID anywhere in the filename, so they work with any naming convention you might have used.

readmeScriptsCheck.message: The scripts check your downloads folder for files containing each track ID:

readmeScriptsCheckMp3.message: - Looks for *.mp3 files with the track ID in the filename

readmeScriptsCheckTxt.message: - Looks for *.txt files with the track ID in the filename

readmeScriptsCheckWav.message: - Looks for *.wav files with the track ID in the filename

readmeShFile.message: - check-library.sh: Linux/macOS script to check for downloaded files

readmeSupport.message: For support or issues, visit the extension's GitHub repository.

readmeTitle.message: Suno Tracks Exporter - Library Check Scripts

readmeWindowsStep1.message: 1. Extract this ZIP file to your downloads folder (where your MP3/WAV files are)

readmeWindowsStep3.message: 3. The script will analyze your folder and create:

readmeWindowsStep3a.message: - missing-tracks.txt: List of tracks with file status (mp3Found, wavFound, txtFound, duplicates)

readmeWindowsStep3b.message: - duplicates.txt: List of tracks with multiple files showing filenames and dates

readmeWindowsStep4.message: 4. Use the Custom Download tab in Suno Tracks Exporter to download missing tracks

scriptExtensionLimitation.message: Extensions can't access your system storage, so I created this workaround for failed batches, missing tracks.

tokenCaptured.message: Session captured successfully! You can now use the downloader.

tokenNotCapturedInstructions.message:
1. Navigate to different pages on suno.com
2. Click on "Library" or "Create" to trigger API calls
3. The session will be captured automatically

tokenNotFoundInstructions.message: Navigate around suno.com (library, create page, etc.) to capture session automatically, or click "Extract Session".

turnOffAskWhere.description: Turn off ask where to save instruction
turnOffAskWhere.message: and turn OFF "Ask where to save each file before downloading"

warningMessage.message: You're about to download a potentially large number of files. To avoid confirming each download one by one,
